quick_start_desc: Start a meeting immediately with default settings. Or customize below.
codes_share: Share these role-specific codes with participants:
hint_org_name: Appears in the top bar during the meeting and in exported minutes.
hint_total_membership: Used to calculate quorum. Leave blank if unknown.
hint_quorum: Default quorum is a majority of the total membership (RONR).
hint_voting_basis: How votes are counted for each threshold type. RONR default counts only votes actually cast.
hint_debate_limits: Leave total debate blank for no limit.
hint_electronic_participation: Electronic and proxy voting must be authorized in your bylaws.
template_helper: Prefill settings and agenda with a common meeting pattern. You can edit everything afterward.
template_apply_confirm: Applying a template will replace current agenda and selected meeting settings. Continue?
hint_meeting_name: Displayed in the top bar and used in minutes export.
hint_language: All participants will see the meeting interface in this language.
minutes_step_hint: Optional. If off, the meeting proceeds directly after roll call.
hint_agenda_guidance: Items listed here will guide the chair but are not binding.
hint_agenda_orders: Items will be treated as adopted orders; deviating requires suspending the rules.
agenda_custom_sequence_hint: By default, agenda items are auto-ordered by parliamentary practice. Enable this only if you need manual ordering.
agenda_unfinished_motion_placeholder: e.g. to postpone the bylaws revision to next regular meeting
agenda_unfinished_amendment_placeholder: e.g. by striking out the date and inserting June 20
agenda_unfinished_amendment_mover_placeh: Required if amendment text is filled
agenda_unfinished_motion_required: Unfinished Business items must include the pending motion text.
agenda_unfinished_amendment_mover_requir: If you include a pending amendment, include who moved it.
previous_notice_desc: Check items for which previous notice has been given:
hint_previous_notice: Checking these indicates notice was given, lowering the required vote to a majority.
special_restrict: Restrict business to items specified in the call
hint_meeting_type: Special meetings may only consider business mentioned in the call (RONR).
hint_electronic_procedures: Configure how electronic participation is managed during this meeting.
opening_package_enable: Propose bundled adoption of opening items
hint_opening_package: If enabled, the chair will be prompted to propose adopting these items together at the start of the meeting.
timer_auto_yield: Automatically yield the floor when speaking time expires
hint_timer_enforcement: If enabled, the speaker's floor is automatically yielded when the time limit is reached. Otherwise, the timer continues running past zero and the chair may allow the speaker to finish.
audio_enable: Enable audio cues for key meeting events
hint_audio_notifications: Plays brief tones when voting opens, speaking time expires, motions are seconded, and other important events occur.
vote_show_details: Display individual votes when results are announced
hint_vote_transparency: When enabled, the chair will see how each member voted (by name) in the result announcement. By default, only aggregate totals are shown.
